protection.en: A helmet gives protection to your head.

pub.en: They met friends at the pub after work.
pub.zh: 下班後他們在酒吧和朋友碰面。

pump.en: He used a pump to fill the tire.
pump.zh: 他用打氣筒為輪胎打氣。

punch.en: The boxer threw a hard punch.

puppet.en: The children watched a puppet show.
puppet.zh: 孩子們看了一場布偶戲。

purse.en: She put her keys in her purse.
purse.zh: 她把鑰匙放進手提包裡。

queer.en: There was a queer smell in the room.
queer.zh: 房間裡有股奇怪的味道。

quit.en: He quit his job to start a business.

quote.en: She quoted a line from the poem.
quote.zh: 她引用了那首詩裡的一句話。

racial.en: We should treat people of every racial group fairly.
racial.zh: 我們應該公平對待每個種族的人。

rag.en: He wiped the floor with an old rag.

rank.en: She holds a high rank in the army.

rate.en: The success rate of the plan is high.
rate.zh: 這個計畫的成功率很高。

ray.en: A ray of sunlight came through the window.
ray.zh: 一道陽光從窗戶照進來。

razor.en: He shaved with a sharp razor.
razor.zh: 他用鋒利的刮鬍刀刮鬍子。

react.en: She reacted quickly to the danger.
react.zh: 她對危險迅速做出反應。

reasonable.en: The price seems reasonable to me.
reasonable.zh: 這個價格對我來說算合理。

receipt.en: Please keep the receipt for the return.

receiver.en: She picked up the phone receiver.

recognize.en: I didn't recognize you with short hair.
recognize.zh: 你剪短髮我都認不出來了。

recorder.en: He used a recorder to save the interview.
recorder.zh: 他用錄音機保存訪談內容。

rectangle.en: A door has the shape of a rectangle.

reduce.en: We should reduce the amount of trash.

regional.en: This dish is a regional specialty.

regret.zh: 我後悔沒有更努力讀書。

relax.en: She relaxes by listening to music.

release.en: The bird was released back into the wild.

reliable.en: He is a reliable friend you can trust.
reliable.zh: 他是個可以信賴的可靠朋友。

relief.en: It was a relief to hear the good news.
relief.zh: 聽到好消息真讓人鬆了一口氣。

religious.zh: 他們舉行了一場宗教儀式。

rely.en: You can rely on me for help.

remain.en: Few people remained after the show.
remain.zh: 表演結束後沒剩幾個人。

remind.en: Please remind me to call her.

remote.en: They live in a remote mountain village.

replace.en: We need to replace the old computer.
replace.zh: 我們需要換掉這台舊電腦。

represent.en: She will represent our school in the contest.
represent.zh: 她將代表我們學校參加比賽。

request.en: She made a polite request for help.

reserve.en: We reserved a table for four.

resist.en: I couldn't resist the chocolate cake.
resist.zh: 我無法抗拒那個巧克力蛋糕。

resource.en: Water is a valuable natural resource.

response.en: I am waiting for his response.

responsibility.en: It is your responsibility to clean up.

restrict.en: The school restricts phone use in class.
restrict.zh: 學校限制上課使用手機。

reveal.en: She revealed her secret to me.
reveal.zh: 她向我透露了她的秘密。

ribbon.en: She tied her hair with a red ribbon.

rid.en: We need to get rid of the old furniture.
rid.zh: 我們得處理掉那些舊家具。

ripe.en: The bananas are ripe and ready to eat.
ripe.zh: 這些香蕉熟了，可以吃了。

risk.en: There is a risk of falling on the ice.

roar.en: The lion let out a loud roar.
roar.zh: 獅子發出一聲響亮的吼叫。

roast.en: We had roast chicken for dinner.

rob.en: Two men tried to rob the bank.
rob.zh: 兩名男子試圖搶劫銀行。

robe.en: She wore a long silk robe.
robe.zh: 她穿著一件長長的絲袍。

romantic.en: They had a romantic dinner together.
romantic.zh: 他們一起共進了浪漫的晚餐。

rot.en: The fruit will rot if left in the sun.
rot.zh: 水果放在太陽下會腐爛。

rotten.en: She threw away the rotten apple.

rough.en: The surface of the rock is rough.
rough.zh: 這塊岩石的表面很粗糙。

roughly.en: The trip takes roughly two hours.
roughly.zh: 這趟旅程大約需要兩小時。

routine.en: Brushing teeth is part of my daily routine.
routine.zh: 刷牙是我每天例行公事的一部分。

rug.en: A soft rug lay by the bed.
rug.zh: 床邊鋪著一張柔軟的小地毯。

rumor.en: Don't believe every rumor you hear.
rumor.zh: 別相信你聽到的每個謠言。

rush.en: Don't rush; we have plenty of time.

rust.en: The old gate is covered with rust.

sack.en: He carried a sack of rice on his back.

sake.en: She gave up her job for the sake of her children.
sake.zh: 她為了孩子放棄了工作。

salary.en: He earns a good salary at his new job.

sauce.en: She poured tomato sauce on the pasta.
sauce.zh: 她在義大利麵上淋番茄醬。

saucer.en: The cup sat on a small saucer.
saucer.zh: 杯子放在一個小碟子上。

sausage.en: We grilled sausages at the barbecue.

saving.en: She used her savings to buy a bike.
saving.zh: 她用存款買了一輛腳踏車。

scale.en: He weighed the apples on the scale.

scarce.en: Water is scarce in the desert.

scarf.en: She wore a warm scarf in winter.
scarf.zh: 她冬天圍著一條溫暖的圍巾。

scary.en: We watched a scary movie last night.
scary.zh: 我們昨晚看了一部恐怖電影。

scholar.en: The scholar studied old books for years.
scholar.zh: 這位學者研究古書多年。

scholarship.en: She won a scholarship to college.

scientific.en: They used a scientific method to test it.
scientific.zh: 他們用科學方法來測試它。

scientist.en: The scientist made an important discovery.
scientist.zh: 這位科學家有了重要的發現。

scissors.en: Use scissors to cut the paper.

scout.en: The scout searched the area ahead.
scout.zh: 偵察兵搜查了前方的區域。

scream.en: She screamed when she saw the spider.
scream.zh: 她看到蜘蛛時尖叫了起來。

screw.en: He tightened the screw with a screwdriver.
screw.zh: 他用螺絲起子鎖緊螺絲。

scrub.en: She scrubbed the dirty pot clean.

seal.en: A seal rested on the rocks.
seal.zh: 一隻海豹在岩石上休息。

security.zh: 機場安檢檢查了我們的行李。

semester.en: We have exams at the end of the semester.

senior.en: She is a senior student at the school.
senior.zh: 她是這所學校的高年級學生。

sensible.en: It was a sensible choice to save money.

separation.en: The separation from her family was hard.
separation.zh: 和家人分開讓她很難受。

sexual.en: The science book explains sexual differences.
sexual.zh: 這本科學書解釋了性別差異。

sexy.en: The model wore a sexy dress on stage.
sexy.zh: 模特兒在台上穿著一件性感的禮服。

shadow.en: The tree cast a long shadow.
shadow.zh: 那棵樹投下長長的影子。

shallow.en: The water near the shore is shallow.

shampoo.en: She washed her hair with shampoo.

shepherd.en: The shepherd watched over his sheep.

shiny.en: He drives a shiny new car.
shiny.zh: 他開著一輛閃亮的新車。

shovel.en: He dug the hole with a shovel.

shrimp.en: We ate fried shrimp at dinner.

shrink.en: The sweater shrank in the wash.
shrink.zh: 這件毛衣洗了之後縮水了。

sigh.en: She let out a deep sigh.

signal.en: The green signal means you can go.

significant.en: There was a significant change in his grades.
significant.zh: 他的成績有了顯著的改變。

silk.en: The scarf is made of soft silk.
silk.zh: 這條圍巾是用柔軟的絲做的。

similarity.en: There is a similarity between the two stories.
similarity.zh: 這兩個故事有相似之處。

sin.en: In the story, lying was seen as a sin.
sin.zh: 在故事裡，說謊被視為一種罪。

sink.en: The heavy stone sank to the bottom.
sink.zh: 沉重的石頭沉到了底部。

sip.en: She took a small sip of hot tea.

situation.en: We handled the difficult situation calmly.
situation.zh: 我們冷靜地處理了這個困難的情況。

skate.en: We skate on the ice in winter.

ski.en: They went to the mountains to ski.

skillful.zh: 她是個技術熟練的廚師。

skinny.en: The skinny boy ate a big lunch.
skinny.zh: 那個瘦瘦的男孩吃了一頓豐盛的午餐。

slave.en: Long ago, slaves had no freedom.
slave.zh: 很久以前，奴隸沒有自由。

sleeve.en: He rolled up his sleeves to work.

slice.en: Would you like a slice of cake?

slope.en: We walked down the steep slope.

snap.en: The dry branch snapped in two.
snap.zh: 乾枯的樹枝啪一聲斷成兩半。

solid.en: Ice is water in a solid form.

someday.en: Someday I will travel around the world.
someday.zh: 總有一天我要環遊世界。

somehow.en: Somehow he finished the work on time.
somehow.zh: 他不知怎麼地準時完成了工作。

sometime.zh: 我們下週找個時間見面吧。

sorrow.en: Her eyes were full of sorrow.

spaghetti.en: We had spaghetti with meat sauce.
spaghetti.zh: 我們吃了肉醬義大利麵。

specific.en: Please give me a specific example.
specific.zh: 請給我一個具體的例子。

spice.en: She added spice to make the dish tasty.
spice.zh: 她加了香料讓這道菜更美味。

spill.en: Be careful not to spill the milk.

spite.en: In spite of the rain, we went out.
spite.zh: 儘管下雨，我們還是出門了。

splash.en: The kids splashed water at each other.

spoil.en: Too much rain can spoil the crops.

spray.en: She sprayed water on the plants.

squeeze.en: Squeeze the lemon to get the juice.

squirrel.en: A squirrel ran up the tree.

stable.en: He has a stable job and a happy family.
stable.zh: 他有穩定的工作和幸福的家庭。

stadium.en: The stadium was full of fans.

staff.en: The hotel staff are very helpful.
staff.zh: 這家飯店的員工很樂於助人。

stale.en: The bread is stale and hard.

stare.en: It is rude to stare at people.
stare.zh: 盯著別人看是不禮貌的。

starve.en: Without food, the animals would starve.
starve.zh: 沒有食物，這些動物會餓死。

statue.en: A tall statue stands in the park.
statue.zh: 公園裡矗立著一座高大的雕像。

steady.en: Keep a steady hand when you draw.

steal.en: It is wrong to steal from others.
steal.zh: 偷別人的東西是不對的。

steam.en: Steam rose from the hot soup.

steep.en: The hill was too steep to climb.
steep.zh: 這座山太陡了爬不上去。

sticky.en: My hands are sticky from the candy.
sticky.zh: 我的手因為糖果變得黏黏的。

stiff.en: My neck feels stiff this morning.
stiff.zh: 我今天早上脖子很僵硬。

sting.en: A bee can sting if you bother it.

stir.en: Stir the soup so it doesn't burn.

stitch.en: The doctor put three stitches in the cut.

stomach.en: My stomach hurts after eating too much.

stool.en: He sat on a wooden stool.

stormy.en: It was a dark and stormy night.
stormy.zh: 那是個漆黑又有暴風雨的夜晚。

stove.en: She heated the pan on the stove.
stove.zh: 她在爐子上加熱平底鍋。
